fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Business Central.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Business Central.

fields.name: Transformation Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Business Central.

fields.name: Find Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies in the Transformation Rule table the rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Replace Value
fields.tooltip: Specifies rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Starting Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies the first part of text that was imported from an external file to be transformed to a supported value by mapping to the specified field in Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Ending Text
fields.tooltip: Specifies the last part of text that was imported from an external file to be transformed to a supported value by mapping to the specified field in Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Start Position
fields.tooltip: Specifies rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Length
fields.tooltip: Specifies the length of one item unit when measured in the specified unit of measure.

fields.name: Data Format
fields.tooltip: Specifies in the Transformation Rule table the rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Data Formatting Culture
fields.tooltip: Specifies in the Transformation Rule table the rules for how text that was imported from an external file is transformed to a supported value that can be mapped to the specified field in Microsoft Dynamics 365.

fields.name: Next Transformation Rule
fields.tooltip: Specifies the transformation rule that takes the result of this rule and transforms the value.

fields.name: Table ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the table to get the record for the field lookup.

fields.name: Table Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the table to get the record for the field lookup.

fields.name: Source Field ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the field to find the record for the field lookup.

fields.name: Source Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the field to find the record for the field lookup.

fields.name: Target Field ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ID of the field to get the value for the field lookup.

fields.name: Target Field Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the caption of the field to get the value for the field lookup.

fields.name: Field Lookup Rule
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the field lookup. In case of Target the value from the Target Field ID will be taken as is, even if it is blank. In case of Original If Target Is Blank the original value will be taken if target one is blank.

fields.name: Precision
fields.tooltip: Specifies rounding precision.

fields.name: Direction
fields.tooltip: Specifies rounding direction.

fields.name: Extract From Date Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies what should be extracted from the date.
